name_local: Stazione di Firenze Santa Maria Novella

phrases.text_local: Scusi, dov'è il binario per Roma, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, doh-VEH il bee-NAH-ree-oh per ROH-mah, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.translation_en: It is indicated on the monitors.

responses.english: It is indicated on the monitors.

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, dov'è la biglietteria, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, doh-VEH lah bee-lyeh-tteh-REE-ah, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.translation_en: In the center, on the left.

responses.english: In the center, on the left.

likely_response.local: Il deposito è al piano inferiore.
likely_response.pronunciation: EEL deh-poh-SEE-toh È AHL pee-AH-noh een-feh-ree-OH-reh
likely_response.translation_en: The storage is on the lower floor.

responses.english: The storage is on the lower floor.
responses.phonetic: EEL deh-poh-SEE-toh È AHL pee-AH-noh een-feh-ree-OH-reh
responses.french: Il deposito è al piano inferiore.

phrases.text_local: Scusi, come si convalida il biglietto, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, KOH-meh see kon-VAL-ee-dah il bee-lyet-toh, per fah-VOH-reh
